programme.desc: Morning magazine featuring a lively mix of news and current affairs, plus health, entertainment and lifestyle features

programme.title: Lorraine
programme.desc: Entertainment, current affairs and fashion news, as well as showbiz stories and celebrity gossip. Presented by Lorraine Kelly

programme.title: This Morning
programme.desc: A mix of celebrity chat, lifestyle features, advice and competitions

programme.title: Loose Women
programme.desc: Celebrity interviews and studio discussion from a female perspective

programme.title: Dickinson's Real Deal
programme.desc: David Dickinson and the team are in Blackpool, where Tracy Thackray-Howitt assesses a railway clock and a husband and wife team take the dealers to the cleaners

programme.title: Winning Combination
programme.desc: Omid Djalili host the quiz, with Gail, Gary, Jonah, Roshan, Lisa, Rachael, Taven, Nick and Grant trying to be among the four that make the final round for chance to to win the four-digit jackpot defined by the number they were each assigned at the start

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as contestants Fiona, Ash, Kate and Geoff pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Liam is left reeling, Priya is hurt when she has a suggestion, and Jacob tells Leyla he is going to Portugal

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Leanne tells Imran that with Steve now intent on stopping her aappeal, she wants to sue the hospital for negligence. Jenny urges Johnny to leave the past behind, and Adam hopes to reconcile with Sarah

programme.title: Ainsley's Food We Love
programme.desc: Ainsley Harriott recreates some of his mother's recipes, including brown chicken stew and rice 'n' peas and childhood favourite coconut and lime fairy cakes. He is also joined by his old friend and fellow chef Aldo Zilli, who demonstrates a clever twist on the traditional lasagne

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Leanne rails at Imran and Elliot and resolves to find another lawyer to take over her case, Carla learns of Johnny's historic crime, and Sarah and Adam meet to resolve their issues

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity Get Me Out of Here!
programme.desc: After a first week in the Welsh camp, some of the celebrities have adjusted to their new lives, while others are missing home. It remains to be seen how they'll cope with the latest challenges as Ant and Dec reflect on the past 24 hours, and look ahead to the next tasks

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: Unbelievable Moments Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong presents a selection of extraordinary eyewitness footage filmed by members of the public, including the dramatic story of an amateur pilot who built his own plane, but then lost his propeller mid-flight and had to try to land it without any power. A local resident in northern California tries to flee what goes down in history as the state's deadliest wildfire, and a cliff collapse at a popular tourist spot in Greece causes chaos

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
programme.desc: Action from the latest edition of the weekly AEW event, featuring all of the biggest stars on the roster

programme.title: Back to Mine
programme.desc: Jasmine from Suffolk will not settle for romance unless it's amazing. She wants a man with a passion for life and with plenty of interests - and he absolutely must love animals. In an attempt to find Mr Right, she looks round the homes of three potential partners before choosing one for a date - but will any give a clue to the kind of man she is after?

programme.title: Winning Combination
programme.desc: Quiz, hosted by Omid Djalili, in which nine contestants are assigned a number between one and nine. They are then whittled down to a final four, and the combination of numbers they are assigned represents the size of the jackpot they play to win in a final round

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as contestants Rosalind, Megan, Neil and Paul, who have never met before, pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Emmerdale

programme.title: Great Art
programme.desc: Tim Marlow explores the life and work of Johannes Vermeer, examining what a painting on display at the National Gallery reveals about the artist's relationship with music - a popular theme among his peers in the Dutch art world. He also uncovers the stories behind many of Vermeer's other works, including Girl with a Pearl Earring

programme.title: Coronation Street

programme.title: Paul O'Grady's Great British Escape
programme.desc: In a new six-part series, Paul O'Grady shares the beautiful sights, stories and secrets of his beloved adopted home county, Kent. In a year where many people have chosen to holiday closer to home due to the Covid-19 pandemic, Paul embraces the opportunity to rediscover what the county has to offer. In Dover Harbour, Paul boards a speed boat to blast along the iconic white cliffs, where he has an encounter with a colony of harbour seals living on a disused MOD Navy base. Later, he arrives in Whitstable to meet the West family, who have been sorting, selling and shucking oysters for five generations

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Steve implores Leanne to put an end to Oliver's suffering and let him die with dignity, Jenny fears for Johnny's future, and Geoff informs Alya that he is selling the house

programme.title: James Martin's American Adventure
programme.desc: James heads to Philadelphia, where Reading Terminal Market provides all manner of ingredients for his dishes. programme.desc: Alan and Walden decide to get married so Walden can adopt a child. However, Alan has second thoughts when Walden makes him sign a pre-nuptual agreement. Comedy, starring Jon Cryer and Ashton Kutcher

programme.desc: Peter is asked by Joe to be godfather to his daughter, but he commits to his mistaken interpretation of the role so much that he instead becomes a real gangster

programme.desc: An exploration of the Brown-Tubbs family's various incarnations around the world. programme.desc: Priya tries to explain to Al, Ben apologises to Aaron, and it remains to be seen whether Gabby will hold her nerve over her lies

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Comedian Harry Hill narrates another selection of camcorder calamities and viewers' mobile phone footage. Featuring giddy grandmas, wedding nightmares and more below-the-belt mishaps

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: Amy and Dina are both in labour, but while Glenn's manager status gets Dina the royal treatment at the fancy hospital, Amy and Jonah have a far difference experience at a much cheaper clinic. At Cloud 9, Garrett struggles to express his best wishes for the new parents

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: Amy is shocked to discover she has no maternity leave and has to return to work two days after her baby is born, while Johah and Garrett interview applicants

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity Get Me Out of Here!
programme.desc: With more trials and challenges thrown their way, the celebrities brave life in the castle. Ant and Dec present some of the highlights of the past 24 hours and look forward to the next stage

programme.title: Dress to Impress
programme.desc: Three singletons in Essex try to win the affections of podium dancer Ciara by picking an outfit of their choice for her to wear

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Priya tries to explain to Al, Ben apologises to Aaron, and it remains to be seen whether Gabby will hold her nerve over her lies

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill presents more amazing accidents, cute kids and the funniest members of the animal kingdom as filmed on viewers' camcorders and mobile phones.

programme.title: The Ellen DeGeneres Show
programme.desc: Ellen chats to Hollywood star Melissa McCarthy, who tells her all about action comedy Superintelligence.

programme.title: Dress to Impress
programme.desc: Three single men in Cardiff try to win the affection of Ben Brown - also known as Mr Gay Wales 2017 - by each buying their potential date an outfit they think he might like

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill introduces another selection of viewer-submitted mishaps, captured in video form via smartphones, drones and other home-recording equipment. This time, a drone is destroyed by an errant baseball, a seal refuses to join in on a selfie, and a falling tree traps what seems to be a familiar face in the toilet

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity Get Me Out of Here!
programme.desc: With more trials and challenges thrown their way, the celebrities brave life in the castle. Ant and Dec present some of the highlights of the past 24 hours and look forward to the next stage

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity - The Daily Drop
programme.desc: Vick Hope and guests catch up with the latest drama from the camp as this year's contestants continue to endure those tricky trials and the harsh weather

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates more home videos sent in by viewers, featuring classic clips from children around the world as this show focuses on people's formative years

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates a comical selection of mishaps filmed by viewers. A teenager rides her hoverboard into a swimming pool, a man gets his beard caught in a power tool and a drone crashes into an unfortunate child's face

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates a comical selection of mishaps filmed by viewers, featuring a toddler who destroys an expensive TV, a cat making unexpected use of a toaster, and a party-goer who sets his beard on fire

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Walden and Alan consider adopting a six-year-old boy called Louis after Ms McMartin makes the suggestion, and they try to make him feel at home - but they may not get on as well as hoped

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan and Walden officially become foster parents to Louis, who has experience wrapping caregivers around his little finger. Alan tries to be the 'cool' parent, leaving Walden to be the strict voice of reason and their different styles of parenting causes strain to their friendship. Starring Jon Cryer and Ashton Kutcher

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The teams are asked to create five different burgers, with the winners earning a day at Dig This Las Vegas. Dinner service is a struggle for one team, who cannot stop fighting

programme.title: The Emily Atack Show
programme.desc: Emily shares her thoughts on the theme of image, including how to achieve the perfect picture for Instagram, and her ongoing battle with gym equipment

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Quagmire must figure out how to live without his most valuable body part. Meanwhile, Stewie and Brian search for Mort Goldman after learning there is a $10,000 reward for turning him into the police

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: A selfish Peter loses his festive spirit and is visited by the ghosts of Christmas past, present and future, who take him on a journey around Quahog

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Klaus is diagnosed with fish cough, which is has a 99 per cent mortality rate. There is a life-saving surgery available, but it's too expensive and Stan refuses to pay for it. Klaus is irate when he learns that Stan paid more for Navi-Joe - his car's new 'smart' navigation and sound system - than the surgery would cost, so uses CIA technology to transfer his consciousness into Stan's beloved nav system. Plus, Steve and his friends play a prank on Roger, who decides to terrorise them as he seeks vengeance

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Francine finds herself on display to members of the public, after a cast of her most intimate body part becomes 'body art', and features in a museum's exhibition

programme.title: Shopping with Keith Lemon
programme.desc: Keith goes fruit and veg picking with comedian and presenter Joel Dommett and takes a trip down memory lane with Richard Blackwood at a Victorian museum

programme.title: The Cleveland Show
programme.desc: Cookie is upset when Freight Train misses their wedding anniversary party and decides to go on tour with George Clinton and the P-Funk All-Stars. Cleveland convinces him to track his wife down and regain her trust, while Cleveland Jr poses as an insurance executive in an office supplies shop

programme.title: The Cleveland Show
programme.desc: Rallo believes he is a good bowler because he can score strikes with the guard rail up, leaving Donna to deliver an awkward truth. Meanwhile, Cleveland, Lester, Holt and Terry feel their friendship is too predictable, so decide to make it more exciting by taking a trip to an abandoned theme park

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan suffers a minor heart attack and is admitted to hospital to recuperate. However, his time on the wards proves less than relaxing when he is visited by the ghost of his brother Charlie - who takes a wholly unexpected form. Comedy, guest starring Kathy Bates

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan is released from hospital following his heart attack, prompting his friends and family to shower him with love and affection. However, Zoey is not so sure he deserves all the attention. Comedy, starring Jon Cryer

programme.title: The Stand Up Sketch Show
programme.desc: The funniest routines by renowned and up-and-coming comedians - bringing them to life in sketch form, featuring Judi Love, Seann Walsh, Russell Kane, Emmanuel Sonubi and many more

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Angie turns up to visit Curly and catch up with all the gossip. Tricia swears to Vera that Brad is Terry's son. Fiona is upset to hear Alan has kept her away from work parties

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Kevin finds Chris sleeping rough in the garage. Don blames Mike for Josie leaving him and marrying someone else. Angie encourages Des to sell up and go off on his boat

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Tara and Kim go shopping for a wedding dress. Chris and Zoe go to Leeds to find Daniels, who has a shock revelation for them regarding the lady in the lake's death

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Chris cannot believe Zoe has taken Daniels at his word. Tara asks Steve why he is hiding his family from Kim. Andy and Robert set up Jack and Sarah for a night out

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Walker and Miller struggle to decide whether an ex-Army major is guilty of murder after shooting a youth who broke into his home, while Carol tries to get through to a pregnant teenager. Rosie learns the garage is in financial trouble - unaware Peggy and a salesman with big ideas (impressionist Jon Culshaw) have already dreamed up a plan that could save it. Jonathan Kerrigan and Gwen Taylor star

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid dodges a stage performance, only to end up sorting out props and scenery. Classic comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid receives a birthday present from the family - but he does not want it. Classic comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part one of two. Pop befriends a pilot he rescues from his crashed plane, but suspects he is being drawn into a smuggling racket when the family is invited to a celebratory champagne night on the town. Drama, starring David Jason

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: Hugh organises a cricket match between Greek and English teams to bring everyone together. Countess Mavrodaki offers to umpire - but warns Margo that contests between the two nations are never friendly. Spiro advises Louisa that she has terrible taste in men, while Larry finds that Vasilia wants their relationship to progress faster than expected

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A beauty queen is targeted by mysterious attackers ahead of the Miss Yorkshire contest, which attracts more than the usual share of attention when busloads of female protesters turn up to picket the event. Ordered to boost his arrest record, Younger finds a novel way of raising the village's crime rate, while Phil spies an opportunity to get closer to Gina. Steven Blakeley and Mark Jordon star

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kelly flirts with Chris, Marlon is in a panic when the TV crew arrives, and Zak and Butch's plans to interfere with the programme being filmed do not go to plan

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Eric blames Marlon for all the chaos at the tearooms. Sarah kicks Biff and Marlon out of the cottage when she discovers them having a party. Zak panics ahead of his wedding day

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jim is disgusted by the way Andy appears to be hungover all the time. Ashley is thrilled with having Maxine as a girlfriend. Mike sacks his whole workforce

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Fiona tells Alan she needs to be sure before she agrees to marry him. Don lets himself into Mike's factory at night, with a can of petrol

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A photographer is murdered shortly after exhibiting a compromising picture of Barnaby - who becomes a suspect in the ensuing investigation. Joyce concludes that someone is trying to frame him, and is stunned when he admits to a previous relationship with the murdered man's wife. Jones is forced to work with the irritating Martin Spellman to solve the case. Guest starring Liza Goddard, Adrian Scarborough and Richard Lintern

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Leaving behind his beloved Oxford, Morse and a reluctant Lewis set off to investigate the bizarre death of an Englishwoman who was attending a psychotherapy clinic in northern Italy. Their inquiries lead them to the vineyards and villas of Vicenza and the city of Verona - as well as a glamorous opera singer and a convicted fraudster. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star as the detective duo, with Frances Barber, Michael Kitchen, James Grout and Jolyon Baker

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Martin and Louisa have their first fertility consultation with Dr Emma Ryder. Meanwhile, a case of vandalism at a local surf school is reported and PC Joe Penhale investigates. Elsewhere, Dr Edward Mullen returns to the surgery, and Bert is feeling the pressure from Caitlin. Starring Martin Clunes, Lucy Russell and Conleth Hill

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Businessman and owner of the Causton Lions rugby team Mark Adler is mysteriously found dead in the club's cryotherapy chamber, which is normally used by the players for physiotherapy. Barnaby and Winter are called in to investigate and their list of suspects soon includes Adler's wife Samantha, former coach Guy Bevan, troubled star player Danny Wickham and physio Neville Gallagher. Neil Dudgeon stars, with Tamzin Outhwaite, Don Gilet and Michael Maloney

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Reeling from his family tragedy, Will seeks distraction in Geordie's world where a curious case unfolds concerning the murder of a Teddy Boy at a dance hall. The dead boy's pockets reveal a library card from Esme's school, and even more disturbing - a picture of Esme herself. Geordie makes a beeline for the school and grills his frightened daughter. She pleads ignorance, but Will knows something is up when he spots her hiding a love letter. Away from her life at the vicarage, Mrs Chapman feels lost, while Cathy is left shaken by another encounter at work. Robson Green and Tom Brittney star

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The Oxford detective gains a taste of prison life while investigating the murder of an inmate jailed for a property swindle. The victim's two partners-in-crime are also incarcerated in the same low-security cell block. Morse is determined to find out whether they know anything about the killing, but has to avoid offending the prison authorities while also dealing with a brash subordinate. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with guest appearances by Sean Bean, Richard Wilson, Jim Broadbent, Diana Quick and Steven Mackintosh

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid revolts against the chairman of the local residents association

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part two of two. Pop's hoard of cash causes trouble for the family when Marcus Cope resolves to stop Charley buying the hop garden at any cost. Montgomery is unhappy at naval college and the Brigadier's solution provides a challenge for Pop

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: The family's maid goes into labour, so Leslie sends Larry to fetch Dr Petrides. However, he finds the doctor occupied, as he is in the middle of delivering his own wife's baby. Hugh has a proposition for a startled Leonora, which she promises to think about - but an altercation with Vasilia nearly ends in tragedy for them both. Donald attacks a rival suitor for Margo - who finds herself quite delighted by the thought of two men fighting over her - while Theo and Gerry make a discovery at the otters' den

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Walker manages to arrest one member of a robber gang when a sting operation goes wrong - but ends up being taken hostage by the man's brother. The PC's disappearance is bad news for Blaketon, who's frantic to pull together a winning side for the annual cricket match against rivals Scarsdale. Cricketers Martin Bicknell, Ray Illingworth and Brian Close guest star, alongside Dickie Bird as the umpire

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zak asks Ned to be his best man. Lisa is furious to find out where her wedding ring came from. Andy and Robert break into Outhwaite's home only to receive a big shock

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Andy wants to go back to Outhwaite's, but Robert is too scared. Kelly is determined to go ahead with her plan to con Chris. Paddy asks Mandy to live with him

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mike and Alma are stunned to find the factory burnt to the ground. Don phones the police and tells them Mike started the fire himself. Alan gives Fiona a solitaire engagement ring

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mike tries not to worry about the police suspecting him as he knows he is innocent. Jim gets fed up with Andy drinking. Maxine gets Ashley to take her to a nightclub

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When director Nick Cheyney is found beheaded by a guillotine on the set of his latest film, Barnaby and Jones are left with no shortage of suspects. The victim, it transpires, was on poor terms with several people in some way connected to the project, including the mother of his child, and an actor who blamed him for ruining his career. Guest starring Nicky Henson

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The Oxford detective gains a taste of prison life while investigating the murder of an inmate jailed for a property swindle. The victim's two partners-in-crime are also incarcerated in the same low-security cell block. Morse is determined to find out whether they know anything about the killing, but has to avoid offending the prison authorities while also dealing with a brash subordinate. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with guest appearances by Sean Bean, Richard Wilson, Jim Broadbent, Diana Quick and Steven Mackintosh

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Drama series, starring Martin Clunes as a surgeon who takes up a post in a sleepy Cornish village. Martin has to rush Buddy the dog to the vets. Meanwhile, Mrs Tishell's young cousin Sarah joins her for some work experience, but it does not go to plan, and one of Louisa's clients arrives at the surgery unannounced, posing a dilemma

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Barnaby is dragged along to the wedding of the son of Sarah's friend Hazel, the last thing he expects to find himself doing is investigating a murder. But when his wife discovers the body of the bride, Laurel, who has been squeezed to death by her own wedding dress corset, the detective must look more closely at his fellow guests. The victim's husband Gavin is convinced that his wife's death had everything to do with her outspoken nature on her radio show, so Winter's attention soon turns to her unique community of nocturnal listeners. Gavin's scorned ex-fiancee and local wedding dress designer Serena also comes under suspicion, and Barnaby and Winter's enquiries lead them to a local wedding fayre. Neil Dudgeon stars, with Kelly Brook, Nick Hancock and Liz Fraser

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: When a student from a prestigious all-female college is found dead, Will and Geordie infiltrate the murky world of campus politics and university societies to find the killer. Navigating strange initiations, raucous parties - and with investigative journalist, Ellie Harding, hot on their heels - they need to use every advantage at their disposal to unravel the mystery. Cathy's ambitions for a life of her own start to test the delicate family balance, while fresh from a spell with Daniel in Marrakech, Leonard finds it hard to acclimatise to life back in Grantchester. Robson Green and Tom Brittney star

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The detective discovers his half-sister's daughter has committed suicide and sets out to find what prompted it, entering the world of teenage rave parties and drug-taking. Meanwhile, Lewis has his sights set on promotion and studies for exams. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with Sorcha Cusack, Jason Isaacs and John Junkin

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: Little Birchmarch is besieged by traffic until Ida's novel approach makes the Highway's Chief act

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part two of two. The twins abscond from Brockhurst College, but Pop manages to bring them back safe and sound - then lends his services to ensure the boarding school does not have to close. Meanwhile, Primrose makes an unusual request concerning affairs of the heart and Charley launches a bid to buy a local brewery. David Jason stars

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: The family members are surprised to find out that Leslie has three different girlfriends, so Louisa decides to take it upon herself to help him pick one by having each member of the family invite their favourite girl to afternoon tea. Larry injures his leg and Theo decides to use his newly set-up x-ray unit to try and examine it. Elsewhere, Gerry continues to grow his animal collection, Margo takes up a job as Theo's assistant, and Aunt Hermione arrives in Corfu for good

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The police search for a boy who went missing after discovering his mother was having an affair. Younger strikes up an unlikely friendship as he fills in for the local lollipop lady, while Walker finds he isn't over Helen during a date with one of Gina's friends, and Carol's fiance Frank gets time off from the Navy to visit her. Sixties-set drama, with Jonathan Kerrigan and Lisa Kay

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Mandy worries that Paddy will change his mind about them living together, and tells Biff that Kelly is pregnant with his baby. Ned informs Sarah that Jan is coming home for a visit

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Andy hides the cash so Jack and Sarah do not find it, Marlon confronts Andy and Robert about terrorising Outhwaite, and Kelly is angry with Mandy for telling Biff about the baby

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alma apologises to Mike for thinking him capable of arson, Tricia is indignant when he questions her, and Maxine is put out when Ashley does not want to see her again

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Natalie is startled to find Chris is sleeping at the garage. Jim prepares for Steve's home visit. Judy tells Gary she thinks they may need help in conceiving a baby

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby's former CID colleague Jack Colby left the force under a cloud following a sex scandal involving villagers and officers at Causton police station. Now retrained as a probation officer, Jack is working at a halfway house for reformed criminals, so when he is bludgeoned to death the detective sets out to discover why the past would not leave him alone. With Chris Barrie, Edward Petherbridge, Sue Jenkins, Nigel Harrison and Christopher Fairbank

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The detective discovers his half-sister's daughter has committed suicide and sets out to find what prompted it, entering the world of teenage rave parties and drug-taking. Meanwhile, Lewis has his sights set on promotion and studies for exams. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with Sorcha Cusack, Jason Isaacs and John Junkin

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: In the final episode of the ninth series, Martin rushes to Ruth's for a medical emergency, and preparations for Morwenna and Al's wedding do not go to plan. Elsewhere, Martin takes his final GMC assessment under the watchful eye of eminent surgeon Bernard Newton, who monitors Martin's skills in assisted surgery. Starring Martin Clunes, Tom Conti, Caroline Catz and Jessica Ransom

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Things take a gruesome turn when Ferabbees Circus comes to town, bringing with it a chain of sinister clown sightings, threatening notes and deathly dangerous circus acts. Barnaby has to face up to his fears in order to solve the case. Drama, starring Neil Dudgeon, Nick Hendrix, Lorraine Ashbourne and Annette Badland

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: After Will and Leonard witness a deadly and deliberate hit-and-run, Geordie traces the car to a pair of decidedly dysfunctional brothers, whose house lies far off the beaten path. The victim's wife, his employee and the two brothers are all damaged characters caught in a web of lies and betrayals - and it's not just secrets hiding within the siblings' grounds. Back at home, Will and Geordie both struggle as unwelcome guests look set to stay - Will's mum Amelia seems to have found a carbon copy of his late father in her new beau. Meanwhile, a new television set lands in the vicarage - just in time for Eurovision. Robson Green, Tom Brittney and Al Weaver star

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: A former bookie falls under suspicion for the murder of a hospital benefactor, who is found dead in his car. As the detectives investigate the case, it becomes clear their prime suspect had a strong motive, believing the victim was responsible for putting his daughter into a coma. Brian Cox guest stars, with John Thaw and Kevin Whately

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Leaving behind his beloved Oxford, Morse and a reluctant Lewis set off to investigate the bizarre death of an Englishwoman who was attending a psychotherapy clinic in northern Italy. Their inquiries lead them to the vineyards and villas of Vicenza and the city of Verona - as well as a glamorous opera singer and a convicted fraudster. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star as the detective duo, with Frances Barber, Michael Kitchen, James Grout and Jolyon Baker

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Martin and Louisa have their first fertility consultation with Dr Emma Ryder. Meanwhile, a case of vandalism at a local surf school is reported and PC Joe Penhale investigates. Elsewhere, Dr Edward Mullen returns to the surgery, and Bert is feeling the pressure from Caitlin. Starring Martin Clunes, Lucy Russell and Conleth Hill

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Businessman and owner of the Causton Lions rugby team Mark Adler is mysteriously found dead in the club's cryotherapy chamber, which is normally used by the players for physiotherapy. Barnaby and Winter are called in to investigate and their list of suspects soon includes Adler's wife Samantha, former coach Guy Bevan, troubled star player Danny Wickham and physio Neville Gallagher. Neil Dudgeon stars, with Tamzin Outhwaite, Don Gilet and Michael Maloney

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Reeling from his family tragedy, Will seeks distraction in Geordie's world where a curious case unfolds concerning the murder of a Teddy Boy at a dance hall. The dead boy's pockets reveal a library card from Esme's school, and even more disturbing - a picture of Esme herself. Geordie makes a beeline for the school and grills his frightened daughter. She pleads ignorance, but Will knows something is up when he spots her hiding a love letter. Away from her life at the vicarage, Mrs Chapman feels lost, while Cathy is left shaken by another encounter at work. Robson Green and Tom Brittney star

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The Oxford detective gains a taste of prison life while investigating the murder of an inmate jailed for a property swindle. The victim's two partners-in-crime are also incarcerated in the same low-security cell block. Morse is determined to find out whether they know anything about the killing, but has to avoid offending the prison authorities while also dealing with a brash subordinate. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with guest appearances by Sean Bean, Richard Wilson, Jim Broadbent, Diana Quick and Steven Mackintosh

programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jim is disgusted by the way Andy appears to be hungover all the time. Ashley is thrilled with having Maxine as a girlfriend. Mike sacks his whole workforce

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Fiona tells Alan she needs to be sure before she agrees to marry him. Don lets himself into Mike's factory at night, with a can of petrol

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kelly flirts with Chris, Marlon is in a panic when the TV crew arrives, and Zak and Butch's plans to interfere with the programme being filmed do not go to plan

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Eric blames Marlon for all the chaos at the tearooms. Sarah kicks Biff and Marlon out of the cottage when she discovers them having a party. Zak panics ahead of his wedding day

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A beauty queen is targeted by mysterious attackers ahead of the Miss Yorkshire contest, which attracts more than the usual share of attention when busloads of female protesters turn up to picket the event. Ordered to boost his arrest record, Younger finds a novel way of raising the village's crime rate, while Phil spies an opportunity to get closer to Gina. Steven Blakeley and Mark Jordon star

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sally and Mike bring home a tramp, much to Sid's disgust. Comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid revolts against the chairman of the local residents association

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part two of two. Pop's hoard of cash causes trouble for the family when Marcus Cope resolves to stop Charley buying the hop garden at any cost. Montgomery is unhappy at naval college and the Brigadier's solution provides a challenge for Pop

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: The family's maid goes into labour, so Leslie sends Larry to fetch Dr Petrides. However, he finds the doctor occupied, as he is in the middle of delivering his own wife's baby. Hugh has a proposition for a startled Leonora, which she promises to think about - but an altercation with Vasilia nearly ends in tragedy for them both. Donald attacks a rival suitor for Margo - who finds herself quite delighted by the thought of two men fighting over her - while Theo and Gerry make a discovery at the otters' den

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Walker manages to arrest one member of a robber gang when a sting operation goes wrong - but ends up being taken hostage by the man's brother. The PC's disappearance is bad news for Blaketon, who's frantic to pull together a winning side for the annual cricket match against rivals Scarsdale. Cricketers Martin Bicknell, Ray Illingworth and Brian Close guest star, alongside Dickie Bird as the umpire

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zak asks Ned to be his best man. Lisa is furious to find out where her wedding ring came from. Andy and Robert break into Outhwaite's home only to receive a big shock

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Andy wants to go back to Outhwaite's, but Robert is too scared. Kelly is determined to go ahead with her plan to con Chris. Paddy asks Mandy to live with him

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mike and Alma are stunned to find the factory burnt to the ground. Don phones the police and tells them Mike started the fire himself. Alan gives Fiona a solitaire engagement ring

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mike tries not to worry about the police suspecting him as he knows he is innocent. Jim gets fed up with Andy drinking. Maxine gets Ashley to take her to a nightclub

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When director Nick Cheyney is found beheaded by a guillotine on the set of his latest film, Barnaby and Jones are left with no shortage of suspects. The victim, it transpires, was on poor terms with several people in some way connected to the project, including the mother of his child, and an actor who blamed him for ruining his career. Guest starring Nicky Henson

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The Oxford detective gains a taste of prison life while investigating the murder of an inmate jailed for a property swindle. The victim's two partners-in-crime are also incarcerated in the same low-security cell block. Morse is determined to find out whether they know anything about the killing, but has to avoid offending the prison authorities while also dealing with a brash subordinate. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with guest appearances by Sean Bean, Richard Wilson, Jim Broadbent, Diana Quick and Steven Mackintosh

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Drama series, starring Martin Clunes as a surgeon who takes up a post in a sleepy Cornish village. Martin has to rush Buddy the dog to the vets. Meanwhile, Mrs Tishell's young cousin Sarah joins her for some work experience, but it does not go to plan, and one of Louisa's clients arrives at the surgery unannounced, posing a dilemma

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Barnaby is dragged along to the wedding of the son of Sarah's friend Hazel, the last thing he expects to find himself doing is investigating a murder. But when his wife discovers the body of the bride, Laurel, who has been squeezed to death by her own wedding dress corset, the detective must look more closely at his fellow guests. The victim's husband Gavin is convinced that his wife's death had everything to do with her outspoken nature on her radio show, so Winter's attention soon turns to her unique community of nocturnal listeners. Gavin's scorned ex-fiancee and local wedding dress designer Serena also comes under suspicion, and Barnaby and Winter's enquiries lead them to a local wedding fayre. Neil Dudgeon stars, with Kelly Brook, Nick Hancock and Liz Fraser

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: When a student from a prestigious all-female college is found dead, Will and Geordie infiltrate the murky world of campus politics and university societies to find the killer. Navigating strange initiations, raucous parties - and with investigative journalist, Ellie Harding, hot on their heels - they need to use every advantage at their disposal to unravel the mystery. Cathy's ambitions for a life of her own start to test the delicate family balance, while fresh from a spell with Daniel in Marrakech, Leonard finds it hard to acclimatise to life back in Grantchester. Robson Green and Tom Brittney star

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The detective discovers his half-sister's daughter has committed suicide and sets out to find what prompted it, entering the world of teenage rave parties and drug-taking. Meanwhile, Lewis has his sights set on promotion and studies for exams. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with Sorcha Cusack, Jason Isaacs and John Junkin

programme.desc: The couple go to a family wedding, but they don't bargain on Jean's cousin Peggy being there

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid has problems when Jean pleads for a new freezer

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: Little Birchmarch is besieged by traffic until Ida's novel approach makes the Highway's Chief act

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part two of two. The twins abscond from Brockhurst College, but Pop manages to bring them back safe and sound - then lends his services to ensure the boarding school does not have to close. Meanwhile, Primrose makes an unusual request concerning affairs of the heart and Charley launches a bid to buy a local brewery. David Jason stars

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: The family members are surprised to find out that Leslie has three different girlfriends, so Louisa decides to take it upon herself to help him pick one by having each member of the family invite their favourite girl to afternoon tea. Larry injures his leg and Theo decides to use his newly set-up x-ray unit to try and examine it. Elsewhere, Gerry continues to grow his animal collection, Margo takes up a job as Theo's assistant, and Aunt Hermione arrives in Corfu for good

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The police search for a boy who went missing after discovering his mother was having an affair. Younger strikes up an unlikely friendship as he fills in for the local lollipop lady, while Walker finds he isn't over Helen during a date with one of Gina's friends, and Carol's fiance Frank gets time off from the Navy to visit her. Sixties-set drama, with Jonathan Kerrigan and Lisa Kay

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Mandy worries that Paddy will change his mind about them living together, and tells Biff that Kelly is pregnant with his baby. Ned informs Sarah that Jan is coming home for a visit

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Andy hides the cash so Jack and Sarah do not find it, Marlon confronts Andy and Robert about terrorising Outhwaite, and Kelly is angry with Mandy for telling Biff about the baby

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alma apologises to Mike for thinking him capable of arson, Tricia is indignant when he questions her, and Maxine is put out when Ashley does not want to see her again

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Natalie is startled to find Chris is sleeping at the garage. Jim prepares for Steve's home visit. Judy tells Gary she thinks they may need help in conceiving a baby

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby's former CID colleague Jack Colby left the force under a cloud following a sex scandal involving villagers and officers at Causton police station. Now retrained as a probation officer, Jack is working at a halfway house for reformed criminals, so when he is bludgeoned to death the detective sets out to discover why the past would not leave him alone. With Chris Barrie, Edward Petherbridge, Sue Jenkins, Nigel Harrison and Christopher Fairbank

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The detective discovers his half-sister's daughter has committed suicide and sets out to find what prompted it, entering the world of teenage rave parties and drug-taking. Meanwhile, Lewis has his sights set on promotion and studies for exams. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with Sorcha Cusack, Jason Isaacs and John Junkin

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: In the final episode of the ninth series, Martin rushes to Ruth's for a medical emergency, and preparations for Morwenna and Al's wedding do not go to plan. Elsewhere, Martin takes his final GMC assessment under the watchful eye of eminent surgeon Bernard Newton, who monitors Martin's skills in assisted surgery. Starring Martin Clunes, Tom Conti, Caroline Catz and Jessica Ransom

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Things take a gruesome turn when Ferabbees Circus comes to town, bringing with it a chain of sinister clown sightings, threatening notes and deathly dangerous circus acts. Barnaby has to face up to his fears in order to solve the case. Drama, starring Neil Dudgeon, Nick Hendrix, Lorraine Ashbourne and Annette Badland

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: After Will and Leonard witness a deadly and deliberate hit-and-run, Geordie traces the car to a pair of decidedly dysfunctional brothers, whose house lies far off the beaten path. The victim's wife, his employee and the two brothers are all damaged characters caught in a web of lies and betrayals - and it's not just secrets hiding within the siblings' grounds. Back at home, Will and Geordie both struggle as unwelcome guests look set to stay - Will's mum Amelia seems to have found a carbon copy of his late father in her new beau. Meanwhile, a new television set lands in the vicarage - just in time for Eurovision. Robson Green, Tom Brittney and Al Weaver star

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: A former bookie falls under suspicion for the murder of a hospital benefactor, who is found dead in his car. As the detectives investigate the case, it becomes clear their prime suspect had a strong motive, believing the victim was responsible for putting his daughter into a coma. Brian Cox guest stars, with John Thaw and Kevin Whately

programme.title: The Saint

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: In order to investigate a villain's idea of the perfect crime, Harriet poses as a prostitute and Jim goes up in the world. Police drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: Minder

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A visiting American senator is assassinated in broad daylight. After a newspaper publishes the names of witnesses, Bodie and Doyle are assigned to protect them, but the task soon gets out of hand. Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins star

programme.desc: A new recruit cannot cope with the stresses of the job and puts the lives of other squad members in jeopardy. A young Lesley Dunlop (Emmerdale's Brenda Walker) features alongside John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed and Ms Peel investigate the case of several businessman who have been killed by birds of prey - and discover a connection to a comic-book character

programme.desc: Cowley and the team present a line of defence against groups of mercenaries and guerrillas who are waging war on the streets of Britain. David Suchet and Geoffrey Palmer guest star alongside Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A series of damning reports claims police officers are not playing by the book, so Regan poses as an ex-con and heads to a club frequented by two officers suspected of running a protection racket and taking bribes from villains to release them. John Thaw stars

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Five university friends answers questions about top 10 lists from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge, then tries to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money. Hosted by Warwick Davis

programme.title: Griff's Great Australian Adventure
programme.desc: Comedian, actor and travel enthusiast Griff Rhys Jones continues his journey across Australia on the Indian Pacific. He visits Adelaide, Broken Hill and finally Sydney to discover the unique and diverse definitions of what makes this great nation

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy (2004)
programme.desc: The amnesiac assassin is living quietly in hiding, until his former employers come after him again and murder his girlfriend. A CIA operation has ended in disaster, and those responsible intend to clear their names by implicating Bourne. As the former secret agent tries to evade the hitmen on his trail, he also struggles to piece together the truth about his past. Action thriller sequel, starring Matt Damon, Brian Cox, Joan Allen and Julia Stiles

programme.title: The Professionals

Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan gets caught in the crossfire between the family of a recently deceased gangland leader and the members of the late man's crime syndicate, regarding the division of the hoodlum's wealth. Hywel Bennett guest stars, with John Thaw

The new heads girl launches an online campaign against uniform policy that lands her in trouble. Mr Walker is concerned that year 10 pupil Morgan may not be able to catch up with Spanish in time for her exams, and Mr Povey intervenes to find out the underlying cause of her disruptive behaviour

programme.title: Damilola: The Boy Next Door
programme.desc: A poignant and reflective documentary marking the 20th anniversary of 10-year-old Damilola Taylor's violent murder on a North Peckham Estate in south London, presented by the radio presenter, writer and former resident of the estate Yinka Bokinni, who was a childhood friend of Damilola. Throughout the film, Yinka attempts to reconcile the two versions of her past and try to understand how the warm and loving community she remembers so fondly from her childhood was presented in the media as a notorious, crime-ridden estate that was somehow to blame for the tragic loss of a young life

programme.desc: Documentary following the comedian and Last Leg co-host as he embarks on a personal, physical and emotional journey to live out his boyhood dream to play competitive rugby league. The film charts the story of the birth of Physical Disability Rugby League in the UK, and the rise of the Warrington Wolves PDRL team. Travelling to Australia, the side play the South Sydney Rabbitohs at the ANZ Stadium at the first ever International Club Challenge - and even get the chance to meet movie star and Rabbitohs owner Russell Crowe. programme.desc: Debra realises Ray is planning something for her birthday and suggests having a Chinese banquet, but her mother has already started organising an old-fashioned English tea party. Katherine Helmond guest stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The Barones spend Thanksgiving with Amy's parents, but the festivities get off to a bad start by her father's drastic response to the plight of an injured bird. Things liven up when the two families split into teams of Native Americans and Pilgrims to mark the national holiday. Comedy, starring Brad Garrett and Monica Horan

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: Frasier

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Chef and restaurateur Marcus Samuelsson goes undercover to find and mentor America's next great chef. An Ethiopian refugee adopted by a Swedish family, Marcus developed a deep love for cooking at an early age and has since become a renowned force in international cuisine, with over 30 restaurants worldwide. Marcus disguises himself to work incognito in a teaching kitchen, a food truck business, a culinary institute and a soup kitchen, as he searches for undiscovered chefs to mentor

While trying to inject some much-needed flavour into the tired Mediterranean menu, the chef also encourages aunt-and-niece duo Faye and Brenda to settle their differences

Meanwhile, Belinda and Lee's hopes of giving their donjon a much-needed facelift start to fade as a concrete delivery fails to work upon arrival

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the Country
programme.desc: Following Sarah Beeny and her family as they relocate from London to Somerset, renovating a semi-derelict former dairy farm into their dream family home. This time, the family head to a poultry farm that sells a vast array of chickens, ducks and peacocks to the public. Later, Sarah and Graham explore how to make the farm pay for itself by heading off to find out how to make cider at a local cider mill

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Looking back at some of the most memorable stories filmed at King's College Hospital, including a young woman who had been knocked unconscious in an attack on her way home. Elsewhere, 91-year-old Rose is rushed to King's with a suspected stroke, and reminisces about the strength and resilience of her own grandmother, and a junior doctor talks about his background growing up in Liverpool

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A look back at the showbiz singletons who bravely embarked on blind dates with unsuspecting members of the public, including Alexandra Burke's date with professional model Louis, and Esther Rantzen's rendezvous with Irish defence lawyer John. The programme also looks back at the dates of DJ Roman Kemp, Conservative MP Michael Fabricant and former Gogglebox star Sandra Martin

programme.title: Dance Around the World
programme.desc: Three of Europe's most talented dancers take off on a global quest to find the beating heart and cultural roots of street dance. In the final episode, Maren, Suzette and Kym head for New York, where they spend time in The Bronx, the birthplace of hip hop. They hang out with Alien Ness, one of the founding fathers of hip hop and breaking back in the 1970s, who gives them a tour and some history. Later, the trio explore litefeet, once an underground dance performed in subways that has gone mainstream

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: The Fall of Anne Boleyn: Arrest
programme.desc: Tracy Borman tells the story of the downfall of Henry VIII's second wife, charting her arrest, trial and execution. In the first episode, Tracy visits Greenwich to follow the course of events on the day Anne was arrested. She was watching a game of tennis when she received a message calling her before the Privy Council to face accusations of adultery. The programme examines documents revealing her poor standing at court, and why her miscarriage sealed her fate

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Extreme cleaners Richard and Brennan head to Oxfordshire, where they come to the aid of a couple whose cluttered home is putting strain on their marriage. Sarah and Andy live in a four-bedroom detached house with their two children, four cats and one dog, but Andy is a hoarder who struggles to get rid of old family possessions that he just doesn't need, and Sarah is a spender, a shopaholic who buys clothes and jewellery for a fashion business that's yet to get off the ground

programme.title: The Fall of Anne Boleyn: Trial
programme.desc: Tracy Borman traces the events of Monday 15th May 1536, the day of Anne Boleyn's trial in the Tower of London, where she is accused of adultery and treason. Tracy examines the trial papers in the National Archive with lawyer Afua Hirsch, to see if Anne ever stand any chance of a fair hearing

programme.title: Kenneth Williams: In His Own Words
programme.desc: Gyles Brandreth narrates this tribute to the beloved actor, featuring the comedy milestones of his career. Kenneth Williams dominated radio, with shows such as Hancock's Half Hour, Round the Horne, and Just a Minute, and was a staple of 26 of the 31 Carry On films. The documentary features access to Williams's rarely seen photograph albums and correspondence from the star and his family

programme.title: Jason Manford Live at the Manchester Apollo
programme.desc: The comedian performs before his home-town audience in Manchester during his 2009 tour, featuring observational story-telling, anecdotes and teasing repartee with the audience. Among the topics he offers his thoughts on are the rules of driving, the lies dads tell, the proper way to use a urinal and the problems of dealing with nappies

programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: After a Marine Sergeant is found murdered in a National Park, Gibbs and the NCIS team partner with Mounted Police Sergeant May Dawson (guest star Elisabeth Rohm) to solve a string of related crimes in the vicinity

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The stress of McGee and Delilah's imminent wedding takes its toll, as the would-be bride is rushed to hospital. Meanwhile, the NCIS team travels out to sea after an apparently healthy petty officer aboard a Navy destroyer dies mysteriously in his sleep

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs, McGee and Torres travel to a remote area of Paraguay, controlled by a violent group of rebels, in an attempt to locate a missing Navy Seal who disappeared during an unsanctioned trip

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: In Hammersmith, west London, Ann Maurice helps a couple trying to sell their house by helping them store their belongings properly, redecorating and stripping the floors

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Two Thousand Women (1944)
programme.desc: Female prisoners struggle to cope with living in a German internment camp, but find common cause in making life difficult for their captors. When three British airmen are shot down over the prison, they keep them hidden from the Germans while plotting a way to smuggle them out safely. Second World War comedy, with Phyllis Calvert, Flora Robson, Patricia Roc and Renee Houston

programme.title: Pimpernel Smith (1941)
programme.desc: An unassuming English professor working on an archaeological dig in Germany leads a double life helping enemies of the Nazi regime escape the country. Second World War adventure based on The Scarlet Pimpernel, directed by and starring Leslie Howard, with Francis L Sullivan, Mary Morris, Hugh McDermott, Raymond Huntley and Manning Whiley

programme.title: Man in the Saddle (1951)
programme.desc: A wealthy and ambitious cattleman plans to seize all the land surrounding his own. A peaceful rancher living nearby ignores warnings to sell up and avoid a conflict, and as he suffers a campaign of intimidation, he is forced to adopt violent methods to defend his livelihood. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Alexander Knox, Joan Leslie and Ellen Drew

programme.title: Sea of Sand (1958)
programme.desc: Allied troops fighting in North Africa in 1943 are redeployed as saboteurs behind enemy lines to blow up Rommel's desert fuel dumps. A clash of personalities between officers initially causes problems, but the men overcome their differences to work together. Second World War adventure, starring Richard Attenborough, John Gregson, Michael Craig and Vincent Ball

programme.title: Nutty Professor II: The Klumps (2000)
programme.desc: Bumbling scientist Sherman Klump is engaged to be married and determined to rid himself of his troublesome alter ego Buddy Love for ever. All his problems look set to be solved by his fiancee's latest DNA experiment - but things are about to spiral out of control. Comedy sequel, starring Eddie Murphy in multiple roles, along with Janet Jackson and Larry Miller

programme.title: The Other Woman (2014)
programme.desc: A woman is devastated to learn her boyfriend is actually married, but when she meets his wife, they quickly become friends. When they discover he has a third secret lover, they decide to join forces and teach him a lesson. Comedy, starring Cameron Diaz, Leslie Mann, Kate Upton and Nikolaj Coster-Waldau

programme.title: Miss Sloane (2016)
programme.desc: Elizabeth Sloane is the most sought after and formidable lobbyist in Washington DC. But when taking on the most powerful opponent of her career, she finds winning may come at too high a price. Drama, starring Jessica Chastain, Mark Strong and Gugu Mbatha-Raw

programme.title: A Pigeon Sat on a Branch Reflecting on Existence (2014)
programme.desc: Two bickering travelling salesmen wander the country, trying and failing to sell a range of joke shop products and having a series of strange encounters with people who give them a taste of the darker side of human existence. Comedy, starring Holger Andersson and Nils Westblom. In Swedish and English

programme.title: A Day to Remember (1953)
programme.desc: The members of the darts team from the Hand & Flower pub in London head off on a day trip to Boulogne. Among the group is Jim, who is worried that his girlfriend plans to leave him, Shorty, a loner who hopes to join the Foreign Legion, the woman-chasing Charley, and Stan, an entrepreneur who wants to smuggle black-market watches back to the UK. Comedy, starring Stanley Holloway, Donald Sinden and Joan Rice

programme.title: Two Rode Together (1961)
programme.desc: The desperate relatives of people captured by Comanches many years before put pressure on the US military to bring them home. The army hires a cynical frontier marshal, who agrees to negotiate their release in return for a commission. But the townsfolk are forced to face some grim truths when he returns with just one unrecognisable captive. John Ford's Western, with James Stewart, Richard Widmark and Shirley Jones

programme.title: The Naked Jungle (1954)
programme.desc: A tough South American cocoa plantation owner and his newly arrived mail-order bride are menaced by a huge column of ferocious killer ants destroying everything in their path. Thriller, starring Charlton Heston, Eleanor Parker and William Conrad

programme.title: The Man from Laramie (1955)
programme.desc: A cavalry officer determines to avenge the death of his brother, but rather than target the Apaches who killed him, he vows to go after the gang who supplied them with their weapons - leading to conflict with the sadistic son of an elderly rancher. Anthony Mann's Western, starring James Stewart, Arthur Kennedy, Donald Crisp and Cathy O'Donnell

programme.title: Keeping Up with the Joneses (2016)
programme.desc: A suburban couple become embroiled in an international espionage plot when they discover that their seemingly perfect new neighbours are actually government spies. Action comedy, starring Zach Galifianakis, Isla Fisher, Jon Hamm and Gal Gadot

programme.title: Pacific Rim: Uprising (2018)
programme.desc: Ten years after the Pan Pacific Defense Corps unleashed an army of Jaegers - 25-storey tall robots operated by mind-melded humans - former pilot Jake Pentecost is contacted by estranged sister Mako Mori. She implores him to return to the PPDC to head off the threat posed by Liwen Shao, chief executive of Shao Industries, who intends to replace the Jaegers with unmanned drones. Haunted by ghosts of the past, Jake eventually agrees to mentor a 15-year-old cadet called Amara, whose family were crushed to death during one monster attack. Director Steven S DeKnight's literally blockbusting sci-fi sequel, starring John Boyega, Scott Eastwood and Cailee Spaeny

A British soldier deployed to Belfast in 1971, almost immediately finds himself caught up in a riot. In the aftermath, he becomes separated from the rest of his unit. Lost and alone at night in a hostile and unfamiliar area, he makes a disturbing journey in search of safety. Thriller, starring Jack O'Connell and Richard Dormer

programme.title: The Gunman (2015)
programme.desc: A mercenary goes into hiding after successfully carrying out a hit on an African politician that sparks a series of uprisings and violent acts. He re-emerges years later, only to become the latest target of his former colleagues. Crime drama, starring Sean Penn, Idris Elba, Ray Winstone, Javier Bardem and Mark Rylance

programme.title: The Million Pound Note (1954)
programme.desc: An eccentric multimillionaire bets his equally rich brother that if a man is known to be wealthy, he can obtain everything he needs on credit. To put this theory to the test, they give a £1million note to a penniless seaman, but instruct him never to spend it. Comedy adapted from a story by Mark Twain, starring Gregory Peck, Jane Griffiths, Joyce Grenfell and Wilfrid Hyde White

programme.title: Pursued (1947)
programme.desc: A brooding cowboy yearns to find peace, but his life seems to follow a tragic path because of the actions and hatred of a mysterious one-armed stranger and a forgotten incident from his childhood. Western, starring Robert Mitchum, Teresa Wright, Dean Jagger, Judith Anderson, Alan Hale and John Rodney

programme.title: The Day Will Dawn (1942)
programme.desc: A foreign correspondent working in occupied Norway is assigned to an RAF detail helping freedom fighters to sabotage an important German U-boat installation. He enlists the help of a local sea captain's daughter, but the plan goes wrong and he ends up in enemy hands, facing death by firing squad. Second World War adventure, with Hugh Williams, Deborah Kerr and Ralph Richardson

programme.title: Beneath the Planet of the Apes (1969)
programme.desc: A second astronaut arrives on the strange simian-dominated world searching for his predecessor. As he journeys into the infamous forbidden zone, he discovers an underground cult of psychic mutants. Meanwhile, a military coup has taken place among the ape society, leading to an inevitable battle. Sci-fi sequel, with James Franciscus, Charlton Heston and Kim Hunter

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee II (1988)
programme.desc: The rugged Australian adventurer sets out to save his reporter girlfriend from New York drug dealers. Having rescued her from their clutches, he realises they will soon be coming after him - so he decides to even the odds by luring them to the Outback for a final showdown. Comedy adventure sequel, starring Paul Hogan, Linda Kozlowski, John Meillon and Charles S Dutton

programme.title: Office Christmas Party (2016)
programme.desc: When a CEO threatens drastic action to improve the financial performance of the Chicago branch of her company, the affected manager - who is also her brother - throws an epic festive party to impress a client and close a potential sale which would save jobs. Comedy, starring Jason Bateman and Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: The Heat (2013)
programme.desc: An uptight, ambitious FBI agent is sent to Boston to bring a notorious drug kingpin to justice. She ends up forced to team up with a rebellious, foul-mouthed local police detective who has a very different attitude to law enforcement but shares her inability to work with others. Action comedy, starring Sandra Bullock and Melissa McCarthy

programme.title: I, Frankenstein (2014)
programme.desc: The infamous scientist's monster roams the Earth 200 years after burying his creator, and is drawn into an ancient supernatural conflict. Two factions of magical beings are at war, and the key to ending the conflict lies in tapping the secret of the creature's immortality. Fantasy adventure, starring Aaron Eckhart, Bill Nighy and Miranda Otto

While Clive's dad Martin attempts to fix a wall surrounding the lake, Clive investigates a huge, creepy nest in the roof of the orangery, the building that he hopes will one day be a house for his father

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets a self-building couple in Caterham, Surrey, who have spotted the huge potential of a dilapidated bungalow, which they plan to reimagine as a split-level home

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Steve and Beverly Green welcome their guests to Centery Farm, Devon, where one contestant decides to keep her past as a hotel inspector secret. The couple's afternoon herding activity is thwarted by heavy rain and fog, and the following morning's feedback showdown has repercussions that will be felt all week

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Professional chef Ben Cooke invites the contestants to the Little Gloster on the Isle of Wight, where he hopes to impress them with a taste of Scandinavian living. Assisted by his 81-year-old grandmother Lillian, who has more than 50 years' experience in the hotel industry, the host splits the visitors into two teams for a contest, but simmering tensions quickly reach boiling-point, resulting in a bitter snub at dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Stephen Hammon hosts the third day of the competition at the four-star Old Hall House B&B in Warwickshire, providing his guests with a variety of on-site activities including shooting and archery before taking them for a meal at his own restaurant. However, he ends up trying too hard to impress at breakfast the next day after Sandie De Rougemont reveals her past as a hotel inspector

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Ex-hotel inspector Sandie De Rougemont, owner of the House of Agnes in Canterbury, plays host. programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the week's competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Margreeth visit Dick and Angel, who come up with some radical suggestions to change their business plans. Later, Dick and Angel struggle to rescue the trampoline that's been blown into their moat

programme.title: Grand Designs New Zealand
programme.desc: Chris Moller meets Ross Bannan, who has an ambitious plan to create a towering concrete home on the cliffs of Auckland suburb Point Chevalier

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: For most people, living in a lighthouse is pure fantasy. Not so for Edward and Hazel Short and their two young daughters. Back in 2012, they set out to build a brand new, art deco, shining white lighthouse tower with additional bedrooms, guest rooms, and infinity pool on the side - all on a rugged but beautiful clifftop in North Devon. Kevin McCloud sees if they made that dream a reality

programme.title: Building Giants
programme.desc: The construction of supersized container ship the MSC Gulsun, built in South Korea by an international team of ship builders in just 12 months

programme.title: Secrets of the Superfactories
programme.desc: Behind the scenes at factories to reveal the production techniques behind Tesla batteries, Yamaha grand pianos, Siemens Gamesa wind turbine blades and Sandvik's boring bar

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 36-year-old man is rushed to St George's after being involved in a high-speed road traffic collision, with CT scans revealing a potentially life-threatening injury to his spleen. Meanwhile, a 21-year-old who dislocated his finger scoring the winning points in a basketball match believes his trip to A&E is the perfect subject for one of his vlogs

programme.title: Secret History
programme.desc: Documentary catching up with London's Crossrail engineers less than two years after the project's excavations uncovered the 14th-century Charterhouse plague pit. In an extraordinary turn of events, further work on the Liverpool Street station has revealed another burial ground, this time accommodating the capital's radicals, rebels and outsiders. The Bedlam burial ground, which is thought to be the final resting place of nearly 20,000 people, was believed to be lost for around 300 years. Now, with the excavation process under way, archaeologists and historians have been using bone analysis techniques in conjunction with parish records to reveal the names and life stories of those whose remains were found on-site. Their research reveals that people came from as far afield as Africa to work in the English capital, and sheds light on how pollution first became one of the city's most prolific killers

programme.title: Building Giants
programme.desc: The construction of supersized container ship the MSC Gulsun, built in South Korea by an international team of ship builders in just 12 months

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Basset hound Barney is 'top dog' at home, enjoying salmon and venison as some of his favourite treats. But lately Barney's vertebrae have been causing him problems and Noel Fitzpatrick needs to perform high-risk surgery using 3D-printed implants. The professor also treats a giant mastiff called Tank, who is suffering from severe arthritis and needs radical surgery on both elbows, and a family puppy who has fractured his foot jumping off a bed. Now he requires specially developed surgical treatment

Diane and Max Seivewright query the establishment's luxury description, while Galia Grainger complains about the lack of a sea view. However, the hosts hope an indulgent Cornish cream tea, a stick dance and a drink in their garden shed will succeed in winning over the guests

programme.title: Grand Designs

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The return of the documentary about life inside an A&E department, following patients treated in the same 24-hour period at St George's in south-west London. Fourteen-year-old Eduard is rushed in after falling from a swing and fracturing his ankle, while 62-year-old Rosina is treated having broken her wrist on the dancefloor at a family party. Paula is in Resus having been unable to take in food through her feeding tube and it is not only her health that is in danger, but also that of her unborn baby

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: Domestic burglaries in Wiltshire have risen by more than 20 per cent in the past year and this edition explores what lies behind this troubling statistic, looking at the police's struggle to support victims and try to catch the culprits. In Swindon, a burglar is caught red-handed stealing food from someone's freezer, while a 999 call is received from a terrified single woman who has been woken by the sound of breaking glass to find to her horror that her home is being ransacked while she is in her bed

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
